httpx-001.prompt: SSL certificate verification silently ignored when verify=False is set alongside a client certificate path

ground_truth.description: verify=str branch early-returns before cert loading

secondary_findings: cert silently ignored on verify=str path
pragma: nocover = zero test coverage on cert path

httpx-002.prompt: Empty zstd-encoded response body causes decode error instead of returning empty bytes

ground_truth.description: Missing empty-input guard before calling decompressor
ground_truth.fix_summary: Add `if not data: return b""` before `self.seen_data = True`

httpx-003.prompt: RFC 2069 digest authentication fails — where is the qop field omitted for legacy digest auth compatibility?

ground_truth.description: qop omission for RFC 2069 not handled

secondary_findings: test masks bug via DigestApp filter

fastapi-001.prompt: OAuth2 security schemes appear duplicated in OpenAPI spec with and without scopes when declared at APIRouter level

ground_truth.description: list vs dict merge causes duplication

fastapi-002.prompt: Pydantic Json type with list annotation fails in form dependency resolution

ground_truth.description: Json metadata stripped from annotation during dependency analysis

fastapi-003.prompt: Form fields with empty string values are incorrectly treated as None/missing instead of empty string in FastAPI dependency injection
secondary_findings: missing test for empty string form values

vscode-003.prompt: Keybinding resolver picks the wrong command when two keybindings have the same chord and one has a when clause with a negated context key

ground_truth.description: whenIsEntirelyIncluded returns true for negated-when vs undefined; _findCommand last-wins ordering

nextjs-004.prompt: serverPatchReducer loses push/replace history intent on soft navigation retry, causing incorrect browser history entries

ground_truth.description: Boolean condition inversion (&&  vs ||) in refreshReducer fallback

nextjs-005.prompt: Race condition in middleware body cloning with server actions causes request body to be consumed twice

nextjs-006.prompt: LRU cache memory leak — null route handler cache entries have size zero so they are never evicted causing unbounded memory growth

ground_truth.description: calculateSize returns 0 for null; require.ts falsy check on cached null

k8s-003.prompt: Deployment rollout stalls indefinitely when maxUnavailable and maxSurge are both set — reconcileOldReplicaSets in the rolling update controller gets stuck in a loop without making progress
secondary_findings: error swallowing (return false, nil instead of false, err)

k8s-004.prompt: kubelet volume manager deadlocks when reconciler detaches a volume while attach/detach controller holds the global volume lock

ground_truth.description: Deadlock chain across 5 files, 2 lock types (VolumePluginMgr.mutex + nestedPendingOperations.lock)

secondary_findings: FindPluginBySpec uses write lock for reads
GenerateDetachVolumeFunc acquires pm.mutex before pendingOperations.Run (attach does it inside closure)
Distributed liveness via informer lag (MountedByNode stale)

rust-001.prompt: Borrow checker emits confusing error message about lifetime mismatch when returning a reference from a closure that captures a local

ground_truth.description: 5-crate compiler trace (borrowck -> diagnostics -> region_name -> nice_region_error -> session_diagnostics)

httpd-001.prompt: How is an HTTP request processed through the core handler pipeline?

ground_truth.description: Core request processing pipeline routing through hooks

secondary_findings: request_rec struct in httpd.h defines request lifecycle
